# NIP-68 Reference Card

### REFERENCE_CARD
Event kind `20` is for picture-first feeds. Required tags: `title`, `content`. Optional tags: `imeta` (with `url`, `m`, `blurhash`, `dim`, `alt`, `x`, `fallback`), `content-warning`, `p`, `m`, `x`, `t`, `location`, `g`, `L`, `l`. Filter patterns: `kind:20`, `m:image/*`. JSON example:
```json
{
  "kind": 20,
  "content": "description",
  "tags": [
    ["title", "title"],
    ["imeta", "url", "m image/jpeg", ...],
    ...
  ]
}
```
Media types: `image/apng`, `image/avif`, `image

---
